title: rubus adenomallus
intro: Rubus adenomallus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Indian raspberry, is a type of flowering shrub native to the Himalayas and parts of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce fever. The health benefits of Rubus adenomallus include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Rubus adenomallus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
